title: Agentic AI Engineering Intern at Deion
mainText:

Agentic AI Engineering Intern at Deion
Posted 2 weeks ago∙Apply by March 24, 2026 at 9:59 PM
Save

Apply
At a glance
$1–5K/mo
Remote, based in United States
Work from home
Internship
Part-time∙From March 15, 2026 to September 18, 2026
US work authorization required
Job description

Deion is the the done-for-you, anti-AI-slop Canva alternative for YouTube thumbnail design.

It's powered by Semantic Design Engine—a proprietary algorithm that transforms YouTube video titles into custom, download-ready thumbnails. Learn more at https://deion.io/.

We are looking for an undergraduate Agentic AI Engineering Intern for a fixed-scope, fixed-fee 1099 internship contract. This internship is 100% remote in the United States.

Qualification for this opportunity requires completion of a demo project and at least 10 hours of synchronous meeting availability between 1:00 PM and 5:00 Central Time on weekdays, for the next 6 months.

This role is not open to

Individuals on CPT/OPT/EAD
Recruiters
Agencies
Consulting companies
C2C arrangements

This role may be a good fit if

You are comfortable working 100% remotely as part of a distributed team
You excel at designing autonomous systems that don't just follow "if-this-then-that" rules, but can reason through complex tasks using LLMs
Your work products demonstrate a high level of attention to detail and the ability to see the big picture
Your aptitude, mindset, and ability to learn quickly make up for shortcomings in your current skill set
You resonate with MDP's core values:
....... 1. High performance, engagement, and reliability
....... 2. Proper prioritization, timeliness, and risk mitigation
....... 3. Outcome ownership, accountability, and meritocracy
....... 4. Systems thinking, modularity, and automation
....... 5. Excellence in execution and hyper-detail orientation
....... 6. Documentation and asynchronous work
....... 7. Resourceful initiative

This role may require you to

Design and implement custom autonomous agent architectures using Python and Google Cloud infrastructure
Leverage Gemini CLI and Claude Code to accelerate development cycles and orchestrate complex agentic task execution
Build bespoke reasoning loops and decision-making logic to solve open-ended problems without relying on pre-built low-code platforms
Integrate diverse data sources and external services into a cohesive system via robust, Python-based middleware
Debug and refine non-deterministic agent behaviors to ensure reliability, safety, and alignment with user goals
Architect modular systems where agents can autonomously select and use the correct tools for a given task
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, implement, deploy, and scale AI solutions within a cloud-native environment
Document system designs, source code, workflow designs, research, development plans, and engineering standards to enable solution modularity, reproducibility, portability, collaboration, and knowledge sharing
Collaborate with teammates using Slack, Notion, Google Meet, and/or other software

An ideal candidate has

Strong proficiency in Python with a focus on writing clean, scalable, and highly modular code
Practical experience deploying and managing applications within the Google Cloud ecosystem
Familiarity using advanced developer tools like Gemini CLI or Claude Code to solve technical challenges
Demonstrated systems thinking skills with the ability to map out intricate logic flows and manage state across complex processes
The ability to decompose high-level, ambiguous objectives into a series of small, autonomous, and verifiable tasks
Experience using Git-based version control to manage codebases within a collaborative team setting
Excellent communication skills for explaining technical trade-offs and architectural decisions to both technical and non-technical peers
A high degree of adaptability and the "engineer’s intuition" required to troubleshoot probabilistic systems
Effective modular thinking skills evidenced by the ability to break down large, intricate undertakings into a series of smaller self-contained tasks
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Emotional intelligence and coachability

About MyDataProduct

MyDataProduct (MDP) is an independent data product studio and the owner-operator of Deion.

Leveraging best-in-class talent, technologies, and techniques—we design and develop data-empowered software at the intersection of:

Jobs-to-be-Done-informed product strategy
Applied data science
Foundational data engineering, and
Stakeholder value obsession

Engineered with thoughtful precision, MDP data products are defined by:

Niche verticals & use cases
Full-job-cycle value propositions
ML-enabled capabilities
Synergistic data integrations, and
Hyper-personalization

All details of this job description are subject to change at any time, at the sole discretion of Deion or MyDataProduct.
